headline: Duke Energy prices upsized offering of $1.3 billion of 3.000% convertible senior notes due 2029
summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE: DUK) announced the pricing of its offering of $1.3 billion aggregate principal amount of its 3.000% convertible senior notes due 2029 in a private placement under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the "Securities Act"). The size of the offering was increased from the previously announced $1 billion aggregate principal amount of convertible notes.
